source_plan: Find every ticket whose body mentions a six-digit order number starting with 12 (regex \b12\d{4}\b). For each, apply the 'Shipping delay' macro (macro_shipping_delay) as a public reply. The macro substitutes {{requester.first_name}} and {{agent.name}} when rendered.

steps.intent: Open the search for likely shipping tickets at {{ENV_URL}}/search?q=order
List every ticket whose body contains a six-digit order number starting with 12. Use the per-ticket detail view to confirm the body before acting.
For each matching ticket, post the 'macro_shipping_delay' macro via /tickets/<id>/apply_macro with visibility=public. Do NOT leak the requester's PII into the body — the macro itself contains no PII.
